mechanism_narrative: Sustained month-over-month payroll employment growth above 150,000 persons signals robust labor market momentum that supports consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:May 2017 payroll level at 146,063k suggests ongoing expansion
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive payroll growth fails to produce positive 20-day returns in > 55% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 1.5% and inflation (CPIAUCSL) rises more than 0.3% month-over-month, the Fed enters a tightening regime that increases equity discount rates and reduces forward earnings multiples, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:May 2017 FEDFUNDS at 0.9% and CPIAUCSL at 244.158 indicate early-cycle monetary conditions
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite tightening signal, or Rank IC < 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in housing starts (HOUST) below 1,100 thousand units signals weakening residential investment and forward-looking demand contraction, predicting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days as equity markets price in reduced economic momentum.
evidence_refs: fact:May 2017 HOUST at 1,215k indicates above-threshold housing activity
failure_condition: Housing starts below 1,100 fail to precede negative 5-day returns in > 50% of instances, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any rolling 18-month window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) growth decelerates below 0.2% month-over-month while unemployment (UNRATE) rises above 4.5%, signaling simultaneous supply weakness and labor market softening that reduces equity valuations and forward returns over 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:May 2017 INDPRO at 104.0998 and UNRATE at 4.4% show tight labor market with stable supply
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to predict negative 20-day returns in > 55% of triggered instances, or interaction term coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.10) in logistic regression.

mechanism_narrative: Real retail sales (RSAFS) growth accelerates above 0.5% month-over-month, indicating robust consumer demand that supports corporate revenue growth and equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:May 2017 RSAFS at 474,948M indicates sustained consumer spending
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive RSAFS growth fails to produce positive 20-day returns in > 58% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: When real GDP growth (GDPC1) decelerates below 2.0% annualized and the federal funds rate remains above 1.0%, the Fed faces a growth-inflation trade-off that constrains monetary easing, limiting equity upside and producing negative 60-day forward returns.
evidence_refs: fact:Q1 2017 GDPC1 at 16,842.4B and May FEDFUNDS at 0.9% indicate early-cycle conditions
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite signal, or interaction coefficient is not significant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate (UNRATE) rises more than 0.4 percentage points over a 3-month rolling window, signaling labor market deterioration that reduces consumer confidence and equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:May 2017 UNRATE at 4.4% represents tight labor market with low deterioration risk
regime_hint: recession onset or labor market shock
failure_condition: Rising unemployment fails to precede negative 20-day returns in > 55% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any rolling 24-month window.

mechanism_narrative: When housing starts (HOUST) exceed 1,200 thousand units and real retail sales (RSAFS) grow above 0.4% month-over-month simultaneously, the joint demand signal indicates robust consumer and residential investment momentum, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:May 2017 HOUST at 1,215k and RSAFS at 474,948M both support demand strength
regime_hint: mid-cycle expansion with synchronized demand growth
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to produce positive 5-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances, or interaction term is not statistically significant (p > 0.10) in logistic regression.
